Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (182-184 15th Ave San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for (Executor) Debra Dolch.

The sale of 100% interest was confirmed at $1,876,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 5/18/15. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
